creator: peter@netkey.at
text:
Created attachment 194676
Diff Update RetroShare to 0.6.4

Update to RetroShare version 0.6.4

Added files:
* files/patch-libretroshare_src_libretroshare.pro
* files/patch-libretroshare_src_rsserver_rsaccounts.cc
* files/patch-retroshare.pri

Tested with poudriere on 11.1-RELEASE-p11 (will attached log later)

Minor note: I added a RS_REVISION variable to the Makefile, because the GH_TAGNAME is not set. The version / revision is shown in the Preferences -> About dialog.
